texto: My father has the proper degrees and framed pictures on the walls, though they're mostly taped over with photos of children, family and friends. Images from the past and present and trips and experiences combined with files on the floor – it's a happening or collage in progress.
explicacao: Citação de Alex McKeithen sobre temas ligados a familia. “My father has the proper degrees and framed pictures on the walls, though they're mostly taped ov…” articula familia, memoir, reflexao em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
